title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, November 09 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 09/11/2021
Image reference: 2021-11-09_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-november-09-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values have remained stable. Aframax Atalandi (105,300 DWT, Nov 2004, Daewoo) sold for USD 13.60 mil, VV value USD 14.16 mil - BWTS fitted. LR1 Iris Victoria (75,000 DWT, Jun 2010, Minami Nippon) sold to Transocean for USD 17.35 mil, VV value USD 16.78 mil - BWTS fitted.
